features.name: Monorepo Baseline Setup
features.description: Confirm the workspace installs, builds, and type-checks from the repo root using the documented verification path.
features.evidence: Verified from repo root on 2026-06-21 with ./init.sh. Workspace install, backend build, admin build, storefront typecheck, and storefront build all completed successfully.

features.name: Backend API Foundation
features.description: Establish the Hono API structure in apps/backend, including route organization and Cloudflare Worker bindings needed for ecommerce features.
features.evidence: Implemented backend route structure for ecommerce catalog work in apps/backend, including /api/products and /api/product-metadata, and verified with pnpm --filter backend check, pnpm --filter backend build, and ./init.sh on 2026-06-21.

features.name: Data Layer With Drizzle And D1
features.description: Introduce Drizzle schema, migrations, and Cloudflare D1 bindings only after the backend structure is in place.
features.evidence: Added product catalog Drizzle tables, generated apps/backend/drizzle/0001_modern_boom_boom.sql, applied the migration locally with pnpm --filter backend db:migrate:local, and verified the repo with ./init.sh on 2026-06-21.

features.name: Admin App Router Migration
features.description: Move the admin app from starter content toward a React Router-based internal application shell and first operational screens.
features.evidence: Expanded the admin SPA through 2026-06-22 with /orders, /orders/:orderId, /products, /products/new, /products/:productId, /team, and /settings/security. Replaced local demo auth with Better Auth username/password login on apps/backend + apps/admin, reserved bootstrap/seed for the first super-admin, limited team management to super-admin, kept created accounts as admin by default, and kept manual password reset plus signed-in change-password without forgot-password flows. Added dedicated dev/preview ports for admin, backend, and storefront to avoid Vite defaults, then centralized backend CORS handling in apps/backend/src/app.ts and aligned apps/backend/vite.config.ts dev-server preflight so only configured project origins plus the repo's fixed local app ports are allowed with credentials. Verified with pnpm --filter backend build, pnpm --filter admin build, direct local worker requests for bootstrap/sign-in/get-session/change-password/create-user/ban-user/set-user-password/revoke-user-sessions, direct OPTIONS preflight checks for /api/admin/auth/sign-in/username, node --check apps/backend/scripts/seed-admin.mjs, and ./init.sh on 2026-06-22.

features.name: Storefront Commerce Experience
features.description: Build shopper-facing routes and data flows in the React Router storefront, integrating with the backend API once contracts exist.

features.name: Cup Customization And Production Artwork
features.description: Allow admins to define multiple physical customization zones, shoppers to compose single-line text and images, and the backend to validate and export SVG/PDF production artwork.
features.evidence: Implemented customization domain tests, D1 migrations, Hono template/design/export and R2 asset routes, admin zone/block authoring, and a form-driven storefront customizer. Shoppers edit admin-defined text, bounded textarea, preset logo/background, conditional upload, rights, and confirmation blocks while preview geometry remains non-interactive. Backend rebuilds layers authoritatively from block values. Backend/admin/storefront builds pass; browser checks confirmed defaults, conditional fields, two-line enforcement, and no Konva Transformer. Approved production fonts, production text outlining, full admin condition editing, and environment-specific D1 IDs remain pending.
